final:
module top_module(
    input A,
    input B,
    input EN,
    input CLK,
    output reg Z
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge CLK or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (EN) begin
            Z <= A ^ B;
        end else begin
            Z <= 0;
        end
    end

endmodule
